content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (after iter-019)

## HIGH ‚Äî highest-leverage single action: the SHARED valuation-membership lemma
Both the OcOfD G2 leaf `orderAtP_residue_linearEquiv` (L1605) AND the bridge
`carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` section-inverse (~L1884) are blocked on the
SAME Mathlib gap:

> `x ‚àà (algebraMap R K).range ‚Üî 1 ‚â§ Ring.ordFrac R x` for a DVR `R` with fraction
> field `K` (= `IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one`
> specialised to the single DVR stalk).

Action: dispatch ONE `lean-scaffolder` to land this as a `sorry` stub (HAZARD: a
mathlib-build lane that CREATES a new decl with no pre-existing sorry gets
auto-dropped by plan-validate ‚Äî scaffold the stub FIRST), then a plain `prove`
lane. Once it lands it unblocks the leaf AND the bridge ‚Äî close both in the
following iter. `mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one` is already `\mathlibok` in the
chapter; this is its DVR-stalk specialisation.

## HIGH ‚Äî pin the OcOfD G2 leaf in the blueprint (marker-accuracy fix)
The ocofd checker flagged that `lem:cokernel_sheafOf_single_add_stalkAtP_iso_kbar`,
`def:cokernel_skyscraper_hom`, `lem:cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` carry `\leanok`
yet transitively carry `sorryAx`. Root cause: the leaf `orderAtP_residue_linearEquiv`
has NO blueprint node, so the DAG can't see the open obligation. **Do NOT strip the
`\leanok` markers** (the proofs are genuinely sorry-free). Instead, blueprint-writer
must add a node for `orderAtP_residue_linearEquiv` (no `\leanok` ‚Äî it has a sorry)
and add it to the `\uses` of `lem:cokernel_sheafOf_single_add_stalkAtP_iso_kbar`,
restoring honest DAG propagation. Pair with the coverage-debt entries below.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî 1-to-1 coverage debt (blueprint entries owed; planner authors prose)
From `archon dag-query unmatched` ‚Äî 9 new uncovered decls this session:

OcOfD.lean (under `lem:cokernel_sheafOf_single_add_stalkAtP_iso_kbar`):
- `sheafOf.orderAtPSubmodule_le_single_add` ‚Äî uses: order monotonicity in `D`.
- `sheafOf.carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup_germ_coe` ‚Äî uses: `colimit.Œπ_desc`, `carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup`.
- `sheafOf.coe_eqToHom_of_submodule_eq` ‚Äî uses: `eqToHom`, submodule cast.
- `sheafOf.carrierSheaf_stalk_eq_hom_germ_coe` ‚Äî uses: the two above + `iSup_carrierSubmoduleSheaf_eq_orderAtPSubmodule`.
- `sheafOf.cokernel_stalk_at_naturality` ‚Äî uses: `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq_hom_germ_coe`, `stalkFunctor_map_germ_apply`, `carrierPresheaf_le_hom`.
- `sheafOf.orderAtP_quotient_iso_kbar` ‚Äî uses: `ModuleCat.cokernelIsoRangeQuotient`, `orderAtP_residue_linearEquiv`.
- `sheafOf.orderAtP_residue_linearEquiv` ‚Äî uses (intended): `mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one`, `isDiscreteValuationRing_stalk_of_smooth`, `residueField_eq_of_coheight_eq_one`. (sorry ‚Äî no `\leanok`.)

CurveChartDedekind.lean (internal helpers of `lem:chart_dimensionLEOne`):
- `ringKrullDim_globalSections_eq_krullDim` ‚Äî uses: `V.isoSpec`, `PrimeSpectrum.le_iff_specializes`, `krullDim_eq_of_orderIso`, `krullDim_orderDual`.
- `ringKrullDim_globalSections_le_one` ‚Äî corollary; uses the above.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî CurveChartDedekind blueprint chapter mismatch (writer dispatch)
lvbc-curvechartdedekind M1/M3: the chapter proves Lemma 1 over a smooth-curve chart
with the dimension bound derived internally (consuming `krullDim_curve_le_one`), but
the Lean states `chart_dimensionLEOne` over a GENERIC `V` taking `hdim` as an
explicit hypothesis and bridging via the `V.isoSpec` order-iso ‚Äî it never references
`krullDim_curve_le_one` in this file (discharged by the downstream consumer).
Dispatch blueprint-writer to rewrite the chapter to the generic-`V`/`hdim` interface
and document the order-iso bridge (M2 = the two helpers above). Non-gating (0
must-fix) but the chapter currently misdescribes the route.

## LOW ‚Äî OcOfD stale comments + deprecation (route to refactor/cleanup, comment-only)
lean-auditor majors (all comment-only; review agent cannot edit `.lean`):
- Module status block L51‚Äì65 undercounts sorry-bearing decls by 3 (lists 2, actual ~5‚Äì6).
- L69 "3-tier disclosure" paragraph contradicts the now-accurate `sheafOf` sorry-free claim.
- `sheafOf` def docstring L625‚Äì630 falsely says the general branch is an honest typed sorry.
- **11 uses of deprecated `CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val`** across the new G2 code ‚Äî will
  break on the next Mathlib bump removing the compat shim. Worth a refactor pass to
  migrate before it becomes a hard error.

## Do NOT retry without structural change
- `orderAtP_residue_linearEquiv` and the bridge section-inverse: do NOT re-assign a
  blind `prove` lane ‚Äî both are hard-blocked on the valuation-membership lemma. Land
  that lemma FIRST (HIGH item), then the prove lanes are routine.

## Closest-to-completion / ready next
- The G2 cokernel arc is one leaf from fully axiom-clean. The bridge tail (S3
  section-lemma inverse + naturality + 2 ses corners) shares the same gate ‚Äî both
  cones collapse once the valuation lemma lands. Sequence: valuation lemma ‚Üí leaf +
  bridge ‚Üí G2/G3 fully axiom-clean ‚Üí S3 cone done.
- `chart_isDedekindDomain` is now available for the OcOfD bridge consumer.
